name: Inflection-1
archDisplay: Dense Transformer (architecture, dataset, and training procedure undisclosed)
note: Pi's original in-house model; GPT-3.5-class personal-AI chatbot tuned for empathetic conversation over coding or reasoning.

results.notes: Average across 57 MMLU tasks; outperformed GPT-3.5, LLaMA, and PaLM-540B per Inflection's technical memo.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via direct fetch of inflection.ai/inflection-1: page literally states '72.7% on average across all 57 tasks' on MMLU, matching the score exactly. Fetch also confirmed the June 22 2023 announcement date. No changes made.
